items.contentExcerpt: 治国必先治党，党兴才能国强。习近平党建思想站在事关党长期执政、国家长治久安、人民幸福安康的高度，深刻阐明全面从严治党的科学内涵和基本途径，标志着我们党对管党治党规律的认识达到新高度。学习贯彻习近平党建思想，就要以永远在路上的坚韧和执着，以更高标准、更实举措抓好全面从严治党，推动党在革命性锻造中更加坚强有力、更加充满活力。

items.title: Security Council LIVE: Open debate on women, peace and security

items.translatedTitle: 安理会直播：关于妇女、和平与安全的公开辩论
items.summary: The UN Security Council met in New York Wednesday for its annual open debate on women, peace and security, in line with a 25-year-old resolution. The Secretary-General’s most recent report on the issue shows that in 2024, women made up only seven percent of negotiators on average worldwide, and nearly nine out of 10 negotiation tracks included no women negotiators at all. Follow live coverage below, and for daily coverage, check out our full meetings coverage here.

During its flyby of the asteroid Donaldjohanson last year, NASA’s Lucy spacecraft revealed the asteroid to be a wobbly, peanut-shaped body that has undergone a lot of activity in its relatively short history. Formed as fragments coalesced after a violent collision 155 million years ago, the asteroid was transformed by the small but inexorable force of the Sun’s radiation, all while retaining signs of the brief presence of liquid water in its distant pa...

items.impact: 短期对电网、芯片板块情绪构成压制，而半导体设备、有色、消费电子可能获得支撑；需警惕ETF赎回对相关个股的流动性影响。
items.risks: 若资金持续流出，可能加剧相关板块调整；但反弹行情中资金流向变化频繁，需结合更多信息判断趋势。
